questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:
A sheet has been folded in the manner as shown in X, Y and Z respectively and punched. You have to choose from the alterantives how it will look when unfolded.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: A square transparent sheet with a pattern is given in Figure. Find out from amongst the alternatives as to how the pattern would appear when the transparent sheet is folded at the dotted line.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
